sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient will report worsening symptoms.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Recommend increased oral hydration and slow positional changes. Follow up if symptoms worsen or do not improve. The doctor suggests a cortisone injection. The doctor recommends physical therapy. The doctor orders a referral. A referral is requested for dr. martha rivera to be in physical therapy two days per week. The doctor advises the patient to ice and rest.
